---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser (if frontend issue): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- Deployment: [local / Render+Vercel / other]

## Additional Context

Anything else that might be relevant — logs, related issues, recent changes.
